message:
feat: Add test fixtures - sample images and magic bytes

- Add sample images: PNG, JPEG, WebP (50x50 solid colors)
- Add magic byte files for format detection tests
- Fixtures for JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, HEIC, HTML, XML

Part of test coverage epic (get_icloud_image_link-qoh)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"get_icloud_image_link-0oi","title":"Task: Expand extract-functions.mjs to export all testable functions","description":"## What
Expand extract-functions.mjs to extract and export all testable pure functions from the embedded JavaScript.

## Current Exports
- ExitCodes
- detectPlatform
- validateContentType
- validateMagicBytes
- validateImageContent

## New Exports Needed
- formatJsonSuccess
- formatJsonError
- extractGooglePhotosBaseUrl
- getExifDateTime (requires exifr - may need async handling)
- generateFilename
- parseGoogleDriveId
- getGoogleDriveDownloadUrl
- getGoogleDrivePreviewUrl
- ErrorMap

## Implementation

Add new extractors:
```javascript
const extractors = [
  // ... existing ...
  
  // JSON formatting
  { name: 'formatJsonSuccess', pattern: /function formatJsonSuccess\(data\) \{[\s\S]*?^\}/m },
  { name: 'formatJsonError', pattern: /function formatJsonError\(code, message, remediation.*?\) \{[\s\S]*?^\}/m },
  
  // Google Photos
  { name: 'extractGooglePhotosBaseUrl', pattern: /function extractGooglePhotosBaseUrl\(cdnUrl\) \{[\s\S]*?^\}/m },
  
  // Google Drive
  { name: 'parseGoogleDriveId', pattern: /function parseGoogleDriveId\(url\) \{[\s\S]*?^\}/m },
  { name: 'getGoogleDriveDownloadUrl', pattern: /function getGoogleDriveDownloadUrl\(fileId\) \{[\s\S]*?^\}/m },
  { name: 'getGoogleDrivePreviewUrl', pattern: /function getGoogleDrivePreviewUrl\(fileId\) \{[\s\S]*?^\}/m },
  
  // Error mapping
  { name: 'ErrorMap', pattern: /const ErrorMap = \{[\s\S]*?\};/ },
];
```

## Special Cases

### getExifDateTime
This function uses the 'exifr' library which may not be available in test context.
Options:
1. Mock exifr for unit tests
2. Make test depend on exifr being installed
3. Create a wrapper that's easier to test

### generateFilename
May have dependencies on Date - ensure tests mock date for determinism.

## Validation
After updating, run:
```bash
node scripts/tests/extract-functions.mjs > /tmp/test.mjs
node --check /tmp/test.mjs  # Verify syntax
grep 'export {' /tmp/test.mjs  # Verify exports
```

-{"id":"get_icloud_image_link-3ry","title":"Task: Create test fixtures directory with sample images","description":"## What
Create test fixtures directory with real image files for unit tests.

## Directory Structure
```
scripts/tests/fixtures/
├── images/
│   ├── sample-jpeg-with-exif.jpg   # JPEG with known EXIF datetime
│   ├── sample-jpeg-no-exif.jpg     # JPEG without EXIF
│   ├── sample-png.png              # Basic PNG
│   ├── sample-webp.webp            # WebP format
│   └── sample-heic.heic            # HEIC (if available)
├── magic-bytes/
│   ├── jpeg.bin                    # FF D8 FF E0 00 10 4A 46 49 46
│   ├── png.bin                     # 89 50 4E 47 0D 0A 1A 0A
│   ├── html.bin                    # 3C 21 44 4F 43 54 59 50 45
│   └── heic.bin                    # 00 00 00 18 66 74 79 70 68 65 69 63
└── expected-hashes/
    └── README.md                   # Explains hash storage
```

## Sample JPEG with EXIF Requirements
- Known DateTimeOriginal: 2024-01-15T10:30:00
- Small file size (<100KB for fast tests)
- Royalty-free source

## Creation Script
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# scripts/tests/create-fixtures.sh

# Generate minimal JPEG with EXIF
# Using ImageMagick + exiftool

convert -size 100x100 xc:blue /tmp/sample.jpg
exiftool -DateTimeOriginal='2024:01:15 10:30:00' /tmp/sample.jpg
mv /tmp/sample.jpg scripts/tests/fixtures/images/sample-jpeg-with-exif.jpg

# Generate magic byte files
printf '\xFF\xD8\xFF\xE0\x00\x10\x4A\x46\x49\x46' > scripts/tests/fixtures/magic-bytes/jpeg.bin
printf '\x89\x50\x4E\x47\x0D\x0A\x1A\x0A' > scripts/tests/fixtures/magic-bytes/png.bin
printf '<!DOCTYPE html>' > scripts/tests/fixtures/magic-bytes/html.bin
```

## Notes
- Commit fixtures to git (small files only)
- Document source/license for images
- Include creation script for reproducibility

 {"id":"get_icloud_image_link-4gr","title":"Task: Enhance CI pipeline with E2E test matrix","description":"## What
Enhance .github/workflows/ci.yml with E2E test matrix for all platforms.

## Current CI Jobs
- shellcheck
- syntax-check
- unit-tests
- install-test (ubuntu/macos matrix)
- real-link-test (iCloud only, schedule/manual)
- version-consistency

## New CI Jobs

### e2e-platform-tests
```yaml
e2e-platform-tests:
  name: E2E Platform Tests
  needs: [shellcheck, syntax-check, unit-tests]
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  timeout-minutes: 30
  # Only run on schedule or manual trigger (avoid burning API credits)
  if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' || github.event_name == 'schedule' }}
  strategy:
    fail-fast: false
    matrix:
      platform:
        - icloud
        - dropbox
        - google-photos
        # google-drive excluded (experimental, requires manual testing)
  steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: '20'
    - name: Cache dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: .ci-cache
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-giil-${{ hashFiles('giil') }}
    - name: Run ${{ matrix.platform }} test
      run: bash scripts/tests/e2e/${{ matrix.platform }}.test.sh
      env:
        GIIL_HOME: ${{ github.workspace }}/.ci-cache/giil
```

### e2e-output-modes
```yaml
e2e-output-modes:
  name: E2E Output Mode Tests
  needs: [e2e-platform-tests]
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Test output modes
      run: bash scripts/tests/e2e/output-modes.test.sh
```

## Artifact Upload on Failure
Add step to upload debug artifacts if tests fail:
```yaml
    - name: Upload debug artifacts
      if: failure()
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: debug-${{ matrix.platform }}
        path: |
          .ci-output/
          giil_debug_*.png
          giil_debug_*.html
```

 {"id":"get_icloud_image_link-4z2","title":"Task: Migrate existing real_link_test.sh to new E2E structure","description":"## What
Migrate the existing scripts/real_link_test.sh to the new E2E test structure with enhanced logging.

## Current Location
scripts/real_link_test.sh

## New Location
scripts/tests/e2e/icloud.test.sh

## Changes Required

### 1. Add logging library
```bash
source "$(dirname "$0")/../lib/log.sh"
```

### 2. Replace echo with log_* functions
```bash
# Before:
echo '[error] Output file missing'

# After:
log_fail 'Output file missing'
```

### 3. Add timing metrics
```bash
start_time=$(date +%s.%N)
# ... run giil ...
end_time=$(date +%s.%N)
duration=$(echo "$end_time - $start_time" | bc)
log_info "Duration: ${duration}s"
```

### 4. Add JSON schema validation
```bash
# Verify v3 schema fields
echo "$output" | jq -e '.ok and .schema_version and .platform' || log_fail 'Missing v3 schema fields'
```

### 5. Keep backward compatibility
Create symlink from old location:
```bash
ln -sf tests/e2e/icloud.test.sh scripts/real_link_test.sh
```

## Testing
After migration:
```bash
bash scripts/tests/e2e/icloud.test.sh
# Should produce structured output with PASS/FAIL
```

 {"id":"get_icloud_image_link-54j","title":"Task: Unit tests for Google Drive ID parsing (parseGoogleDriveId)","description":"## What
Test parseGoogleDriveId() and related URL builder functions.

## Functions to Test
1. parseGoogleDriveId(url) - Extracts file ID from various Drive URL formats
2. getGoogleDriveDownloadUrl(fileId) - Creates /uc?export=download URL
3. getGoogleDrivePreviewUrl(fileId) - Creates /file/d/.../view URL

## Test Cases for parseGoogleDriveId
1. drive.google.com/file/d/XXX/view
2. drive.google.com/open?id=XXX
3. docs.google.com/file/d/XXX/view
4. docs.google.com/document/d/XXX (Google Doc, not image)
5. URL with extra query params
6. Invalid/malformed URL
7. Non-Drive URL

## Test Cases for URL builders
1. Valid file ID produces correct URL structure
2. Empty file ID handled gracefully

## File
scripts/tests/google-drive.test.mjs
